ddls:
CREATE TABLE "permits" (
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permit */,
  "period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the permit period */,
  "period_end" TEXT /* End date of the permit period */,
  "target_species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target species */,
  "authorization_number" TEXT /* Authorization number of the permit */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the permit was notified */,
  "authorized_by" TEXT /* Authority that authorized the permit */,
  "national_licence_authorization_details" TEXT /* Details of national licence authorization */,
  "permit_version" INTEGER /* Version of the permit */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the permit (e.g., active, expired, revoked) */,
  "issued_date" TEXT /* Date the permit was issued */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the permit was last renewed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the permit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permits_target_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_species_id") REFERENCES target_species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "species_type" TEXT /* Type of species (e.g., fish, mammal) */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "population_estimate" INTEGER /* Population estimate of the species */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last population survey */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Typical habitat of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the conservation area */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the conservation area */,
  "area_size" REAL /* Size of the conservation area in square kilometers */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the conservation area was established */,
  "management_body" TEXT /* Body responsible for managing the conservation area */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the management body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regulation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the regulation became effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the regulation will expire */,
  "responsible_authority" TEXT /* Authority responsible for enforcing the regulation */,
  "penalties" TEXT /* Penalties for violating the regulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fishing_gears" (
  "gear_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fishing gear */,
  "gear_name" TEXT /* Name of the fishing gear */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fishing gear */,
  "max_catch_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum catch capacity of the fishing gear */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the gear was approved for use */,
  "approval_authority" TEXT /* Authority that approved the gear */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gear_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vessels" (
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vessel */,
  "vessel_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel */,
  "vessel_type" TEXT /* Type of vessel (e.g., boat, ship) */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vessel */,
  "tonnage" REAL /* Tonnage of the vessel */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the vessel */,
  "capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of the vessel in terms of crew and cargo */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel owner */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the vessel owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, conservationist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permit being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the permit */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the permit was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_permit_id FOREIGN KEY ("permit_id") REFERENCES permits ("permit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permit_species" (
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permit */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target species */,
  "quota" INTEGER /* Quota for the species under the permit */,
  "season" TEXT /* Specific season for which the quota applies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permit_id", "species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permit_areas" (
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permit */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conservation area */,
  "max_catch_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum catch limit for the area under the permit */,
  "restrictions" TEXT /* Specific restrictions or conditions for the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permit_id", "area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permit_gears" (
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permit */,
  "gear_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishing gear */,
  "gear_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of gears allowed under the permit */,
  "usage_conditions" TEXT /* Specific conditions for using the gear */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permit_id", "gear_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permit_vessels" (
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permit */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel */,
  "vessel_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of vessels allowed under the permit */,
  "usage_conditions" TEXT /* Specific conditions for using the vessel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permit_id", "vessel_id")
)
